input.background: Given $n=100$ with 25 successes, and 75 failures, an $80 \%$ two-sided confidence limits on $p$ can be obtained by solving the following equations simultaneously.
input.question: Solve the equation $\sum_{i=0}^{24}\binom{100}{i} p_U^i\left(1-p_U\right)^{100-i}=0.10$ to find the upper confidence limit $p_U$.
